title: Ke’n Mu Khin Tang Lawm Taktak

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ke’n mukhin tang lawm taktak, ka sapna teng hong dimsak,
mit tawh keimah in, ka mu thei a tawntungin,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hallelujah ka Honpa tawh ka paikhawm hi,
Hong it hong angvanna sungah kei hong kem hi,
Kei guak hi ke’ng, kei guak pai ngei

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka kha hong cidamsak a, ka nunna hong nuamsak a,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Maipha hong pia ka dah ciang, ze-etna lian ka thuak ciang,
A ang sung khawlmun nuam bang, Muzo ke’ng tawldamna dang,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Inn hong bawlsak van tungah, limlang tuipi gal khatah,
Ka sunmang hong tangtung ding, tua munah kei ka teng ding,
